title: store.rs doc references VALID_ROLES by name across module boundary
description: store.rs upsert_space_member_with_role doc now says "role must be a value in VALID_ROLES (defined in jmap.rs)". If VALID_ROLES is renamed or moved (say, to a shared validation module), the doc silently lies. Low probability but silent divergence. Alternative: just list the values inline in the doc ("one of admin, moderator, member") — stable, no cross-module reference needed.
